name: Pack Of 12 - Spectrum Gusto Soup For Cat With Tuna Chicken And Sweet Potato 50g
description: SPECTRUM GUSTO Soup for Cats with Tuna, Chicken, and Sweet Potato: The Soup can be given as a complementary food or just as everyday reward/treat. You can use a spoon on which you are offering the soup in several portions. Treat your feline friend to a delightful snack experience with SPECTRUM GUSTO Soup! This delicious blend features tender tuna and chicken, perfectly complemented by nutritious sweet potato. Packed in a convenient 50g pouch, it’s ideal for a quick snack or a meal topper. Contents: Water, Tuna fillet 15.40%, Chicken 10%, Sweet potato 4.7%, Fish broth, Natural thickener (Tapioca starch (E1442), Guar gum (E412)). Nutrient Components: Crude Protein 8%, Crude Fat 0.3%, Crude Ash 1%, Crude Fiber 0.1%, Moisture 90%. Key Features: Savory Ingredients: Made with real tuna and chicken for a taste your cat will love. Nutritious Addition: Sweet potato adds essential vitamins and fiber, supporting digestive health. Moist & Tasty: The rich, flavorful broth keeps your cat hydrated and satisfied. Easy to Serve: Simply pour and serve; perfect for picky eaters! Give your cat a taste sensation that’s both delicious and nutritious with SPECTRUM GUSTO Soup! Your furry companion deserves the best. Always have fresh drinking water available for your cat. See imprint on package.
